author: christianwannerstedt
description: Turn lists into neatly formatted key-value lists.

manifest.author: Christian Wannerstedt
manifest.description: Makes it easy to turn lists into formatted key-value lists.
manifest.name: Key-Value List

name: Key-Value List

releases.author: christianwannerstedt
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Support nested key-value lists by @christianwannerstedt in https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/pull/35


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/compare/1.9.0...1.10.0

releases.author: christianwannerstedt
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add frontmatter cssclass controls for enabling or disabling the plugin per file and mode.
* Add configurable per-list key/value right-alignment markers around the delimiter, with rendering support in Live Preview and read mode.
* Fix delimiter setting visibility, improve read-mode list sizing, and bump the plugin version to 1.9.0.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/compare/1.8.0...1.9.0

releases.author: christianwannerstedt
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Refactor rendering and add reliable Live Preview support (v1.8.0) by @christianwannerstedt in https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/pull/33


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/compare/1.7.0...1.8.0

releases.author: christianwannerstedt
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* 15 feature request allow for more than one delimiter configuration 1 by @christianwannerstedt in https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/pull/21


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/compare/1.6.0...1.7.0

releases.author: christianwannerstedt
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Tweak reg exp to avoid cutting last key char in read mode by @christianwannerstedt in https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/pull/20


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/compare/1.5.0...1.6.0

releases.author: christianwannerstedt
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Don't treat rows with double delimiters as key value items
* Don't display duplicated link icons
* Handle different edge cases when rendering key value lists in read mode
* Make value link clicks work in edit mode

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/compare/1.4.0...1.5.0

releases.author: christianwannerstedt
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Handle task checkbox in keys by @christianwannerstedt in https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/pull/12


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/compare/1.3.0...1.4.0

releases.author: christianwannerstedt
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add support for footnotes in the value by @christianwannerstedt in https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/pull/10

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/compare/1.2.0...1.3.0

releases.author: christianwannerstedt
releases.description:
## What's Changed
- Made it possible to change the displayed bullet character(s)
- Minor tweaks to settings panel

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/compare/1.1.0...1.2.0

releases.author: christianwannerstedt
releases.description:
## What's Changed
Make it possible to exclude specific files through `cssclasses`

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/compare/1.0.0...1.1.0

releases.author: christianwannerstedt
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* 1 visibility in read mode by @christianwannerstedt in https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/pull/6

Add support for read mode.
**Breaking change:** The custom bullet char setting is now removed and will be replaced by the ordinary list bullet `-`. The main reason is to simplify the code base, as it would be quite complex to be able to handle dynamic characters in a good way in read mode.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-key-value-list/compare/0.1.1...1.0.0

releases.author: christianwannerstedt
releases.description:
The first version of the Key-Value list plugin.
Makes it easy to turn lists into formatted key-value lists.
